blocks.content: A Flutter iOS app that reads a bank statement PDF and turns it into spending analytics, forecasts, and recurring-subscription detection. The app runs a multi-stage AI pipeline on top of OpenRouter: extract, parse, normalize, convert currency, categorize, detect recurring charges, detect reversals, and remove duplicates (both at the file level using SHA-256 and at the transaction level). It uses 159 keyword rules across 17 categories, normalizes 100+ merchant brands, and supports 35+ currencies. Reports can be shared with other users through encrypted Supabase storage. Stmnt is live on the App Store and I ship updates to it every week.

items.title: On a Generalization of Kernel RLS to Nonlinear State-Space Systems

blocks.content: My senior research project at Khalifa University (May 2023). I derived the ARMA time-series learning algorithm from first principles, rewrote it as a least-squares problem in two unknowns, and turned it into the Kernel Recursive Least Squares (KRLS) algorithm in MATLAB. I then extended the construction to nonlinear state-space systems using tensor products in a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (the KAARMA algorithm). The project was supervised by Prof. Ibrahim M. Elfadel (EECS) and Prof. Jorge P. Zubelli (Mathematics).

blocks.caption: Benchmarked on the Santa Fe laser time-series, the standard test for chaotic time-series prediction. NMSE (normalized mean squared error) measures how far a prediction lands from the true value. Lower is better.
blocks.chart:

blocks.content: A production salon-management platform built with the Join-Future team. I work across the stack — TypeScript services, a Flutter client, and a production PostgreSQL backend on AWS. My focus has been making it reliable and safe to run in production.
Interest-free (qard hasan) loan tracking between friends — a record of agreement, not a payment processor. Built in TypeScript.
A small utility around GCC currency data.
Additional production systems with the Join-Future team across payments and AI platforms. Details under wraps.
